name: Obsidian Forgemaster
title: Works black glass and red heat

abilities.name: Black-Glass Edge
abilities.text: Deal 105. If target is CRAFT-typed, deal 50 more.

abilities.name: Remake
abilities.text: Return any CRAFT card from discard to play with full HP.

typed_abilities.name: Black-Glass Edge
typed_abilities.text: Deal 105. If target is CRAFT-typed, deal 50 more.

typed_abilities.name: Remake
typed_abilities.text: Return any CRAFT card from discard to play with full HP.

flavor_text: Cuts when cooled. Heals when hot. Knows the difference.
